title: Lutzia australis
taxonomy: Lutzia australis is classified within the family Myricaceae and is a member of the genus Lutzia. This plant is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the order Myrtales. uses: Lutzia australis, also known as the Australian grass wren or the Australian lily, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
